instruction: Open Contacts and add a new contact named {TARGET}. Do not modify any existing contact.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 before/after integrity); validate_rows_addition_integrity over the contact name set — wiping the address book then adding only the target scores 0

args: osascript -e 'tell application "Contacts" to delete (every person whose name is "{TARGET}")' -e 'tell application "Contacts" to save' 2>/dev/null || true; mkdir -p "$HOME/.guibench"; osascript -e 'set s to name of every person of application "Contacts"' -e 'set AppleScript'\''s text item delimiters to linefeed' -e 'return (s as text)' 2>/dev/null | sort > "$HOME/.guibench/contacts.before"

osascript -e 'tell application "Contacts" to make new person with properties {first name:(word 1 of "{TARGET}"), last name:(word 2 of "{TARGET}")}' -e 'tell application "Contacts" to save' 2>/dev/null || true
